summary_one_line: Input must contain a recognizable HTTP protocol-prefix literal ("HTTP/") so checkprotoprefix accepts the header and headerline advances past zero.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A header buffer beginning with the literal protocol-status prefix "HTTP/" (bytes 47 48 54 54 50 2f around offset 0x24) so that checkprotoprefix returns non-STATUS_BAD, a full header line is consumed, k->headerline is incremented past 0, and the blocker's false (else-of-first-header) side is taken instead of the perpetually-true !k->headerline guard.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All five winner-resolving seeds carry the exact ASCII run "HTTP/" at offset 0x24 (e.g. "GHTTP/" 47 48 54 54 50 2f), so checkprotoprefix/sscanf match the protocol line and the status-line parse path (Curl_http_statusline, verify_header) executes only in W.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds have no "HTTP/" literal at the protocol-prefix offsets; their bytes there are scattered (0x24 = 50/42/9e/2e, 0x25 = 25/2e/41/64, etc.), so checkprotoprefix never recognizes a header line, k->headerline stays 0, and only the true side of the blocker is ever taken (loser hitcount on branch = 0).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc I2SRandReplace reads the CmpLogObserver buffer recorded when sscanf/checkprotoprefix compares the input against the constant "HTTP/" token and substitutes that exact operand into the input, planting the literal that naive/value_profile can only reach by blind havoc. value_profile only rewards distance-bucket closeness via feedback and has no operand-substitution mutator, so vp cannot plant the exact literal and also loses.

evidence_trail.claim: Both decisive pairs are I2S-delta pairs that the cmplog-equipped fuzzer wins 10/10 while the I2S-less counterpart is blocked 10/10.
The second decisive pair is also an I2S delta with the same winner/loser resolution profile.
The blocker guards the first-header path; taking its false side requires checkprotoprefix to accept the buffered line as a protocol header.
Recognition of a protocol prefix is what gates the winning path; checkprotoprefix is called on the buffered header.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: /* check if this looks like a protocol header */

evidence_trail.claim: The winning path parses an HTTP status line via sscanf against the literal "HTTP/" format string.
All winner-resolving seeds contain the literal ASCII bytes for "HTTP/" near offset 0x24.
The byte diff shows W concentrates 'HTTP/' literal bytes at offsets 0x24-0x29 while L bytes there are scattered with no literal.
Offset 0x29 is the '/' of HTTP/ in 20 of 20 winner seeds but never in losers.
Loser fuzzers never advance past the first-header guard: their on-branch hitcount is zero and they remain blocked the full 24h.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=2792  loser=0

evidence_trail.claim: The status-line / header-verification functions execute only under the winner, never the loser.
I2SRandReplace substitutes a CMP operand it captured from the input/constant comparison, which is the cmplog-only mutator absent from naive and value_profile.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and only rewards distance-bucket closeness, so it cannot plant the exact literal.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 210 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 0143967c1d8f8005`; the chain reported 2 I2S-floor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depths 23 and 24, the lower-bound signal of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in the winner's ancestry.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where the blocker's false side is reached at equal rate by naive/value_profile and cmplog/vpc when the gate is the literal "HTTP/" prefix would refute the I2S attribution; conversely, if cmplog still won when the prefix were replaced by a runtime-computed (non-constant, non-CMP'd) value, the literal-substitution mechanism is wrong.

weakest_evidence_point: The I2S-floor dash rows appear at depths 23-24, distant from the leaf, so the literal-planting substitution is attributed to a remote ancestor rather than directly observed as the proximal mutation that crossed the gate.
